code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    has = true
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    if has
      if neg
        nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, cur)
      end
      has = false
      neg = false
      cur = 0
    else
      neg = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  if neg
    nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
  else
    nums = list.push(nums, cur)
  end
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut out = ""
mut j = total - 1
mut first = true
while j >= 0
  let v_opt = list.get(nums, j)
  let v = match v_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end

println(out)
